aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as a clear service structure and location information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and keyword optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local search presence.
Optimize meta titles and descriptions with relevant keywords for each service page.
Create location-specific service pages for high-demand areas like Phoenix and Scottsdale.

gbp_analysis.found: Google Business Profile (GBP) is not explicitly mentioned or linked on the website.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP or its integration on the website is a significant gap. GBP is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No evidence of an active GBP linked to the website.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement metrics.
Missing location-specific service details that could be highlighted in GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website but lack consistency and broader citation across local directories.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and local directories.
List the business in relevant local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific sites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of content depth and keyword optimization for AI-driven search algorithms.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and conversational AI due to the absence of FAQ sections and structured data for AI consumption.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate an FAQ section addressing common customer queries related to AC repair and plumbing services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop blog content that establishes the business as an authority in HVAC and plumbing, targeting long-tail keywords and local search terms.

business_name: AZ Home Services Group AC Repair & Plumbing Services of Scottsdale
page_title: AZ Home Services Group - AC Repair & Plumbing Services - Scottsdale, Arizona
